name: Supertrend MACD Reversal Proof
edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips capture trend reversals, but many are noise-driven whipsaws. MACD histogram acts as independent momentum proof — when the histogram is positive at a Supertrend long flip (or negative at a short flip), the reversal has genuine momentum behind it, not just a wick-driven ATR reset. This filters the Supertrend's known weakness (whipsaw in ranging markets) by requiring a second, orthogonal momentum signal. Unlike ADX (dead as filter), MACD histogram directly measures momentum magnitude and direction. The combo has never been tested: Supertrend is proven (PF=1.921 in 8:1 tail harvester) and MACD is proven (PF=1.712 in 7:1), but their synergy is untested.

variants.name: st_macd_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: Supertrend direction flip + MACD histogram positive. 8:1 R:R. Tests whether MACD momentum proof filters Supertrend whipsaws.

components.notes: Supertrend direction indicator. Crosses above 0 = bullish flip, below 0 = bearish flip. Entry trigger.
MACD histogram. Positive = bullish momentum, negative = bearish. Proves reversal has genuine momentum.
ATR-based position sizing and R:R framework.

variants.name: st_macd_v2_cross_8to1
variants.description: Stricter: Supertrend direction flip + MACD histogram crosses zero (fresh momentum, not residual). Tests whether requiring fresh momentum at the exact reversal bar improves precision at cost of fewer entries.

components.notes: MACD histogram zero-cross — requires fresh momentum at reversal, not just residual.

variants.name: st_macd_v3_wide_10to1
variants.description: Wider R:R at 10:1 with permissive MACD gate (> -0.5 for long). Tests if allowing slightly negative histogram catches earlier reversals where momentum hasn't fully turned but Supertrend already flipped. Higher R:R compensates for lower precision.

components.notes: Permissive MACD gate — allows early entries where momentum is turning but not yet positive.

indicator_roles.baseline: SUPERTd_7_3.0 — Supertrend direction indicator. Flip from -1 to 1 captures trend reversal events.
indicator_roles.confirmation: MACDh_12_26_9 — MACD histogram measures momentum magnitude. Independent confirmation that reversal has real force.
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework.
